hash_consing_event_sourcing.notes: Optional dedup fits ordinary immutable record patterns.

ordinary_object_records.notes: ConceptRecord is just a typed immutable object record.

provenance_merkle_content_addressed.notes: Reuse digest/integrity and immutable references instead of inventing a new identity system.

self_describing_records_and_tagged_union.notes: Inline manifest is a packaging choice, not a new learning mechanism.

systematic_codes_and_exact_graph_plus_ve.notes: This stage compares exact structural bits beside a semantic payload against ordinary sidecar storage.

typed_structs_ast_dag.notes: CompositeManifest is an exact first-order AST/DAG node.

vsa_item_memories_and_map_ops.notes: Reuse existing MAP operations and verification, not a new VSA algebra.

blocked_claims: compact identity codes are not pointers/handles
exact history recovered from semantic similarity alone
